response.justification: A versatile, senior-level polyglot engineer with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring) and some large-scale, low-latency distributed-systems exposure (micro-services handling millions of requests/second, Direct Mail platform, Kubernetes/AWS). However, the role's hard minimum of 8 years of C++ is not met — C++ appears only in the NI LabWindows/CVI tenure and a bachelor thesis, while the candidate's depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. The infra and leadership signals are real but informal, and cloud-compute-platform experience is thin relative to the bar.
strengths: Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus active mentoring via workshops and dojos
Real distributed-systems experience: low-latency micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Broad full-stack and infra range including Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and DevOps tooling setup
concerns: Does not meet the 8-year C++ minimum — C++ exposure is limited and dated
Core depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not the C++-centric compute platform stack
Technical leadership is informal (titles, teaching) rather than owning cloud/DevOps team strategy

key_factors.factor: Formal technical leadership of cloud teams
